name: TA Missoula (TravelCenters of America #256)
description: Full-service 24-hour travel center at the Hwy 93/I-90 junction (the Wye) with truck parking, showers, deli, laundry, service bays and CAT scale.

name: Flying J / Town Pump #914
description: Town Pump-operated Flying J travel plaza near I-90 Exit 96 with diesel lanes, truck parking, McDonald's, showers and laundry.

name: Town Pump #911 Superior
description: 24-hour Town Pump truck stop at Exit 47 with diesel lanes, showers, casino, ATM, laundry and bulk DEF.

name: St. Regis Travel Center (Conoco/Phillips 66)
description: Conoco-branded travel center at Exit 33 serving fuel, food and restrooms to travelers and truck traffic on the MT-135 junction.

name: Cenex St. Regis
description: Cenex fuel station at Exit 33 in St. Regis offering regular, midgrade, premium and diesel.

name: Fic's Plaza (I-90 Auto/Truck Plaza)
description: Locally owned 24-hour Fickler Oil truck stop at Exit 184 with 19 diesel pumps, DEF, restrooms and food outlets; the only truck stop in Deer Lodge.

name: CAT Scale - Missoula (Exit 96)
description: Certified CAT Scale (#1753) located at the I-90 Exit 96 truck stop cluster on Hwy 93 N in Missoula.

name: Exit 96 Shine Truck & RV Wash
description: Automated truck and RV wash near I-90 Exit 96 in Missoula.

name: American Truck Wash
description: Truck wash facility in Missoula off the I-90 corridor.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Missoula
description: Commercial and OTR tire dealer in Missoula offering 24-hour roadside truck tire service and retreading.

name: Montana Roadside Services
description: 24-hour mobile truck and trailer repair / roadside service based in Missoula covering the I-90 corridor.

name: Saltese (Haugan) Eastbound Weigh Station
description: Eastbound I-90 weigh station near Haugan (around milepost 15), the first Montana scale east of the Idaho line.

name: Dena Mora Rest Area (Lookout Pass)
description: MDT rest area with both eastbound and westbound facilities near milepost 4-5, just inside the Idaho line at Lookout Pass.

name: Quartz Flats Rest Area
description: MDT rest area roughly 58 miles from the Idaho border between St. Regis and Alberton with truck parking and restrooms.
